offer: For specialty trade contractors processing 5–15 invoices/month, poor project tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide streamlined progress tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to effectively track project progress and report accurately.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for specialty trade contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on project tracking solutions
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Engage in community forums for trade contractors
try_it: Let users try manual entry of project milestones and reporting dashboard
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for updates
Allow CSV import for existing project data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
